response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and has a current career gap — raising concerns about recent AI-focused impact and continuity.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation
Proven full-stack proficiency with TypeScript, cloud tools (AWS CDK), and distributed systems
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solution development
Missing demonstrated experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Current career gap since Oct 2025 and limited recent enterprise AI deployment track record

key_factors.factor: Career gap and recent AI focus
